description: Golden vector for ComputeEscrowSplitID per ADR-005 §2 (v7.75 migration). The SplitID is LengthPrefixed("ORTHOLOG-V7.75-ESCROW-SPLIT", dealerDID_bytes, nonce[:]). The 32-byte nonce is length-prefixed uniformly with the rule even though it is a fixed-size field — applying the rule uniformly beats case-by-case reasoning about truly-fixed fields. Any deviation from this digest is a cross-implementation compatibility break.
